programs.title: Lego City Adventures
programs.sub_title: Race to the Top/Metal Harl Hubbs
programs.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest in 'Race to the Top', then in 'Meet Harl Hubbs', we see a day in the life of helpful handyman Harl Hubbs.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: Barbie embarks on adventures with friends and family -- including next-door neighbour Ken -- in this animated vlog of adventures filmed inside her family's new dreamhouse.

programs.title: Theatre Dome
programs.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Nerves are tested at the Olympic trials as our players take on the most challenging sport in history - Hobby Horsing!

programs.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programs.desc: After locating Lunia’s hourglass, the team heads to the dream world’s sun, which holds more secrets than the object they’re searching for!

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: Fran discovers her new boyfriend has a secret which could cost Maxwell a fortune.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: It's Sylvia's birthday and Fran and CC find themselves locked in Maxwell's wine cellar.
